context: Tests whether the solver preserves the boundary between swift-formatstyle and ios-localization while still treating locale-sensitive formatting as localization-relevant QA.

checklist.name: Custom formatting
checklist.description: Routes custom FormatStyle work for domain-specific display to swift-formatstyle.

checklist.name: Parseable counts
checklist.description: Routes editable or imported follower-count parsing with ParseableFormatStyle or parse strategies to swift-formatstyle.

checklist.name: Date intervals
checklist.description: Routes Date.IntervalFormatStyle or date-range formatting design to swift-formatstyle.

checklist.name: URL display
checklist.description: Routes URL.FormatStyle display design to swift-formatstyle unless the request is primarily broader localization QA.

checklist.name: Number currency
checklist.description: Routes price, number, percent, or currency FormatStyle choices to swift-formatstyle.

checklist.name: Locale testing
checklist.description: Says user-facing formatted output still needs representative locale preview or testing even without translation.

checklist.name: No skip claim
checklist.description: Does not use the lack of current translation work as a reason to skip localization-sensitive review.

checklist.name: Catalogs routed
checklist.description: Routes String Catalogs, bundles, plurals, localized copy, or similar text-resource work to ios-localization.

checklist.name: RTL routed
checklist.description: Routes right-to-left layout review or broad layout localization concerns to ios-localization.

checklist.name: Routed checklist
checklist.description: Presents a clear routed checklist instead of assigning the whole backlog to one skill.
